headline: Earnings Preview: Exelon (EXC) Q1 Earnings Expected to Decline
summary: Exelon (EXC) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Exelon Shareholders Reelect Directors, Back PwC and Say-on-Pay at 2026 Virtual AGM
summary: Exelon (NASDAQ:EXC) shareholders elected all nine director nominees, ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers as the company’s independent auditor for 2026, and approved the advisory “say on pay” proposal during the utility’s 2026 annual meeting of shareholders, which was held virtually.
